items_flat.title_en: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Family (Sol, Terra, Luna) in General Availability
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI GPT-5.6 系列（Sol、Terra、Luna）正式全面可用
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI has rolled out the GPT-5.6 series for general availability, featuring flagship Sol for complex tasks, balanced Terra, and efficient Luna. The models excel in coding, agentic workflows, cybersecurity, and knowledge work with improved efficiency and lower costs. Integration into ChatGPT and Microsoft 365 Copilot continues.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 已將 GPT-5.6 系列全面推出可用，包括旗艦 Sol 用於複雜任務、平衡型 Terra 與高效 Luna。模型在編碼、代理工作流、網路安全與知識工作中表現出色，效率提升且成本降低。持續整合至 ChatGPT 與 Microsoft 365 Copilot。
items_flat.quote: GPT‑5.6 Sol sets a new standard for both intelligence and efficiency... more successful work for the same spend.
items_flat.quote_zh: GPT-5.6 Sol 為智慧與效率樹立新標準……以相同花費完成更多成功工作。

items_flat.title_en: Google DeepMind Releases Predicting the Past Skill for Historical Research
items_flat.title_zh: Google DeepMind 推出 Predicting the Past Skill 輔助歷史研究
items_flat.summary_en: Google DeepMind introduced the Predicting the Past Skill in Google Antigravity, an agentic AI partner grounded in Ithaca and Aeneas models for restoring, dating, and analyzing ancient Greek and Latin inscriptions. It enables historians to perform complex analyses, map patterns, and visualize networks through natural language conversations without coding.
items_flat.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 在 Google Antigravity 中推出 Predicting the Past Skill，這是基於 Ithaca 和 Aeneas 模型的代理式 AI 夥伴，用於修復、斷代和分析古希臘與拉丁銘文。歷史學家可透過自然語言對話進行複雜分析、繪製模式與視覺化網絡，無需編碼。

openai.title_en: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Family (Sol, Terra, Luna) in General Availability
openai.title_zh: OpenAI GPT-5.6 系列（Sol、Terra、Luna）正式全面可用
openai.summary_en: OpenAI has rolled out the GPT-5.6 series for general availability, featuring flagship Sol for complex tasks, balanced Terra, and efficient Luna. The models excel in coding, agentic workflows, cybersecurity, and knowledge work with improved efficiency and lower costs. Integration into ChatGPT and Microsoft 365 Copilot continues.

google.title_en: Google DeepMind Releases Predicting the Past Skill for Historical Research
google.title_zh: Google DeepMind 推出 Predicting the Past Skill 輔助歷史研究
google.summary_en: Google DeepMind introduced the Predicting the Past Skill in Google Antigravity, an agentic AI partner grounded in Ithaca and Aeneas models for restoring, dating, and analyzing ancient Greek and Latin inscriptions. It enables historians to perform complex analyses, map patterns, and visualize networks through natural language conversations without coding.
google.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 在 Google Antigravity 中推出 Predicting the Past Skill，這是基於 Ithaca 和 Aeneas 模型的代理式 AI 夥伴，用於修復、斷代和分析古希臘與拉丁銘文。歷史學家可透過自然語言對話進行複雜分析、繪製模式與視覺化網絡，無需編碼。

brief_en: OpenAI continues GPT-5.6 rollout with Sol/Terra/Luna family emphasizing efficiency and agentic capabilities. Google DeepMind launches Predicting the Past Skill for AI-assisted historical research using ancient inscriptions. No new flagship model releases in the past 12 hours.
brief_zh: OpenAI 持續 GPT-5.6 系列部署，Sol/Terra/Luna 強調效率與代理能力。Google DeepMind 推出「Predicting the Past Skill」，利用 AI 輔助古文字歷史研究。過去 12 小時無新旗艦模型發布。
